# Jentech Electrical

> Brisbane's premium electrician. Family-owned, licensed, 24/7 emergency service. Commercial, residential, industrial, air conditioning, smoke alarms, switchboard upgrades, UPS systems.

Address: 6/190 Station Rd, Yeerongpilly QLD 4105
Phone: 07 3914 9696
Email: info@jentechelectrical.com.au
Office hours: Mon–Fri 9:00am–4:00pm (24/7 emergency service available)
QLD Electrical Licence: 80766
ARC Refrigerant Handling Licence (RTA): AU068040
ABN: 46 611 087 462
Service area: Greater Brisbane and the Gold Coast hinterland
Rating: 5.0 stars (158 Google reviews)

## Services

- [Commercial Electrical](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/commercial): Fit-outs, emergency breakdowns, repairs & maintenance, testing & compliance for Brisbane businesses.
- [Residential & Renovations](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/residential): LED lighting, full rewiring, switchboard upgrades, new builds and extensions for premium homes.
- [Industrial](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/industrial): 3-phase machinery connections, emergency stops, shop and factory lighting, load balancing.
- [Air Conditioning](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/air-conditioning): Split system installations, year-round servicing, repairs and multi-split design.
- [Smoke Alarms](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/smoke-alarms): Installation and compliance testing to AS3786 and QLD 2027 interconnected-alarm requirements.
- [Switchboards](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/switchboards): Upgrades to modern RCD-protected switchboards and safety inspections.
- [UPS Systems](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/services/ups-systems): Authorised PSS Distributors service agent. NDIS-compliant UPS installations and long-life batteries for QLD conditions.

## Emergency

- [Emergency Electrician Brisbane](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/emergency-electrician-brisbane): 24/7 response for power outages, burning smells, tripping breakers, and after-hours faults.

## Guides

- [Loss of Power — Troubleshooting Guide](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/guides/loss-of-power): Step-by-step steps to safely diagnose a power outage.
- [No Hot Water — Troubleshooting Guide](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/guides/no-hot-water): What to check before calling a technician or plumber.

## Projects

- [Project Gallery](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/projects): 11 completed and in-progress projects — Queenslander renovations, commercial fit-outs, and luxury homes.

## Contact

- [Contact Jentech Electrical](https://jentec-electrical.vercel.app/contact): Phone, email, service-area list, and Google Maps.
